# Benjamin Looi

> Portfolio and technical writing by Benjamin Looi, a software engineer focused on TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, product engineering, and practical software delivery.

Canonical site: https://www.benjaminlooi.dev

- Home: https://www.benjaminlooi.dev/

- Projects: https://www.benjaminlooi.dev/projects
- Blog: https://www.benjaminlooi.dev/blog
- Contact: https://www.benjaminlooi.dev/contact

## Preferred Citation

When citing this site, use the canonical URL of the specific page and attribute the author as Benjamin Looi.
